transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
Both my hands are full right now, so I can't really move
It's raining here
Isn't it weird how you feel down and sore on rainy days?
I wanted to turn my day around so I am here to eat some Korean pancake with rice wine
I just got rejected to film at 8 restaurants
And this right here is my last thread of hope
The entrance looks like this It's cool, right?
[Poor internet connection]
[Last thread of hope=OUT]
Does anybody know a pancake place around here?
[Viewer: Hwanghaedo Mung Bean Pancakes] I found it!
What do I do now?
What if I get rejected again?
[Asking for permission]
[SUCCESS]

[Menu]
Excuse me,
1 meat mung bean pancake, 1 assorted pancake, 1 seafood pancake,
1 kimchi pancake, 1 large size dongdongju (rice wine)
You have a group coming? No, it's just me
You can't eat it all
[Customer: She can eat it all. I've seen it]
Are you here to set a new Guinness record?
I'm hungry
[Rice Wine 5,000 Won (~$4.52 USD)]
Thank you
They said that this was made with aged ginseng
It's very cheap
It's filled all the way to the top
And it's only 5,000 Won!
[Some pickled radish while we wait]

Even the radish tastes good because I'm hungry
I think something is coming out
[Assorted pancakes 15,000 Won (~$13.57 USD)
[Includes: mung Bean pancake, mushroom pancake, zucchini pancake, pollack pancake, meatball pancake, green chili pepper pancake, imitation crab meat pancake]
Looks scrumptious
Let's try a bite of each first
Looking delicious
Which one is this?
Dip it in soy sauce
It's a fish pancake and it's so tasty
It just melted in my mouth
Which one is this?
Oh, green chili pepper
Will I be able to eat this?
Oh hey, its not bad
It's okay

Which one is this?
It looks like a meatball pancake
There's some meat and shiitake mushroom on top of it
Let's try it
So yummy
This is really good Their pancakes are amazing
I'm not a fan of zucchini
I thought about "accidentally" dropping it
But that's wrong
It's good
Strange..
No need to say anything for the imitation crab meat. It never fails
People don't like it fried because it doesn't look appetizing
But those are delicious
This is the meatball pancake
It's going to taste good

Wow, this is the real deal
And also as you can see,
It looks like mung bean pancakes
Is it? I'm not too sure actually
I'll try it
It tastes like green pea pancake And it's really tasty
It's been a while since I had Korean traditional pancakes and I love it
I don't really like it that much, but it tastes so good today
I'll eat all the zucchini ones first
It tastes good, but I'm still not a fan
I'll save 1 for later
And now,
For the dongdongju It's my first time trying it
Is this how you drink it? Just like makgeoli? (rice wine)
Pour a lot?
Smells like pears

I can smell the alcohol and something sweet like a pear
Here's one for you
It tastes like herbal medicine
It's not like Soju (Korean alcohol)
It's like herbal medicine
I think it's because of the ginseng
It tastes like a healthy drink And the alcohol is not overpowering either
It's not bad
Mung bean pancake, is it?
Excuse me, what is this? It's mung bean pancakes
Thank you
This is the mung bean pancake
And this is the meat mung bean pancake I'll show you
[After I take a bite]
Yummy
Meat mung bean pancake It looks so good

It looks very crispy
You can taste a strong meat flavor
So good
Really good
Delicious
So good
I've had mung bean pancakes from a lot of places
And this one is really good
The outside is crispy and the inside is soft
Very good
[Rice wine to cool it down]
Thank you
[Kimchi pancake 9,000 Won (~$8.14 USD)
Yummy
It tastes so good, everyone
It's insane

Can I take the green chili pepper out?
It tastes so good
Did you guys know?
I can't eat a lot when I drink alcohol
[Beep: Mythomania (Pathological Lying)]
The orders are not coming out as fast as I want them to
I want to order more
I'm almost finished with this too
They said they will bring out the seafood pancake later
So I said "okay"
Excuse me, can I order chestnut rice wine?
We are out of the chestnut rice wine
Then can I order the Jangsoo (brand) rice wine?
Can I also get Tofu Kimchi?
Tofu Kimchi?
We're making your seafood pancake right now

Meatball pancake They are amazing
[Seafood pancake 10,000 Won (~$9.05 USD)]
Seafood pancake Ta-da~
Nice, nice, very nice
Really nice
It's spicy There's chili pepper inside
A lot of them too
Get out of here
It tastes great
I'm a little tipsy
Drunk people will say they're not drunk
This is like that I'm mentally sober, but my body is drunk
The table next to me got a chestnut rice wine
Excuse me, do you guys have the chestnut now?
That table ordered the last one before you did
It's totally fine, I'll just take the Jangsoo rice wine

[The table is offering her to take their chestnut rice wine] No, no, no it's okay!
It's really okay, no no
It's a present Thank you
I'm thankful, but I feel bad for taking it
It feels weird to take it
[Chestnut explosion]
What have I done?
What a waste!
Tofu Kimchi!
[Tofu Kimchi 9,000 Won (~$8.14 USD)]
Wow, look at the color
It looks like banana milk
That has alcohol?
This is alcohol?
I know it's a creeper, but still It's only a bottle
Let's eat the tofu kimchi

The kimchi is a bit sour
It's sour but tasty regardless
The chestnut rice wine tastes so much better than the dongdongju
[Dips it in her rice wine]
[Crap]
I thought that was my plate
What just happened
Dongdongju is getting me drunk
The chili pepper is spicy
Guys, I don't feel good
Guys, guys, guys
A cold radish kimchi soup
Not cold
[Talking with a foreigner?]
That guy can speak Korean! Get outta here
You can speak Korean? Yes

[HA Got Eem]
Then why did you speak English?
My body can't handle alcohol too well today
I will leave soon
I can't leave leftovers out of respect for the person that gave it up for me
It's a common courtesy to finish what I was given as a present
What if I gave someone my food and they didn't even finish it?
[That's a no-no]
Cheers
Guys, let's go
I finished all the pancakes
There are some tofu kimchi left, but I don't want it
Let's go pay
Can I pay, please?
It's a first (to see someone eat so much alone)
How do you stay so skinny?

You're a celebrity, let's take a picture
A celebrity came to my store I must get a photo
Thank you and take care
I feel so much better after walking a little bit
Exercising is a must
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
